summary: Solid show highlighted by the rare Revolutionary Horsesh*t Blues jam, captured on a well‑regarded Joe recording.
review: The concert is generally praised as a good to solid performance, with fans especially noting the one‑off Revolutionary Horsesh*t Blues improvisation. Recording quality receives a positive nod from at least one reviewer who calls Joe's tape "rock," though no technical details are given. A single negative comment points to an unnamed song that felt like a waste of time.

ai_rating.rationale: Most reviewers rate the show positively (solid/good) and at least one explicitly praises the recording, leading to an overall rating around four stars despite limited detail.

recording_quality.technical_notes: One reviewer says "Joe's recordings rock," indicating a clear, enjoyable tape; no specific issues or source type mentioned.

poor_songs: Unspecified song described as a waste of time
show_quality.setlist_flow: Overall solid performance with a memorable one‑off jam, though at least one track was perceived as weak.
